source: Android ChannelUtilsTests and iOS StreamContinuationListTest disconnect-after-subscription characterization

platformTerminalErrors.android: CancellationException after postDisconnectedAndClearList clears observer channels

expected.commonDecision: A stream that disconnects after observer registration must terminate consumers, clear observers, and cancel upstream work without leaking an active subscription.

notes: Stream utilities can move to shared KMP code only after disconnect-after-subscription termination clears observers and preserves platform terminal-error mapping on Android, iOS, and the shared fake-stream runtime.
